entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Health wearable data source referenced as default source parameter in sleep and activity tracking functions

entities.name: daily_sleep
entities.context: Database table tracking sleep metrics including score, minutes asleep, and minutes in bed per date

entities.name: daily_activity
entities.context: Database table tracking activity metrics including calories, sedentary/active minutes, and active zone minutes

entities.name: intraday_activity
entities.context: Database table for granular within-day activity data, replaced per date

entities.name: SQLite
entities.context: Database engine used via Python sqlite3 module for health data persistence

entities.name: Health Tracking Database
entities.context: Local SQLite database storing Fitbit-sourced daily sleep, daily activity, and intraday activity data with upsert semantics

relationships.context: Fitbit is the default data source for daily sleep records
Fitbit is the default data source for daily activity summaries including active zone minutes
Fitbit supplies intraday granular activity data
Health data stored in SQLite with upsert conflict resolution patterns
Sleep summary table within the health tracking database
Activity summary table within the health tracking database
Intraday granular activity table within the health tracking database
